response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor and software craftsman, but lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and strategic management experience required for a CTO role. While he has a solid background in distributed systems and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, his profile does not demonstrate the required experience in architecting production-grade multi-agent systems for high-stakes financial decisioning or scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and microservices, including high-throughput environments handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling and agentic workflows.
Extensive software engineering experience spanning over two decades across various stacks, architectures, and open-source projects.
concerns: Complete lack of executive-level engineering leadership experience, having primarily operated as a Senior or Staff Software Engineer.
No track record of scaling engineering teams, developing senior technical leadership layers, or managing external delivery partners.
Missing demonstrated experience architecting complex, real-time multi-agent AI systems specifically for credit risk or working-capital management.
